name: Vegetable Beef Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef and beaten egg. Divide into 6 portions and shape into 6"x4" rectangles.
2. Mix together salt, pepper, shredded carrot, celery, and green pepper.
3. Place equal amounts of the vegetable mixture onto each ground beef rectangle.
4. Roll up each rectangle tightly to form a jelly roll shape.
5. Wrap each roll with two slices of bacon.
6. Secure with toothpicks.
7. Place in a baking dish and pour the Italian salad dressing over top.
8. Let stand for about 1 hour, turning occasionally to keep all sides coated.
9. Remove rolls from the pan and grill over medium coals for 20 to 25 minutes, basting with the marinade left in the dish.
10. Turn and baste occasionally.
11. Remove toothpicks before serving. Serves 6
